tagline: Full Service Pool Maintenance and Repair - Satisfaction Guaranteed

hero.headline:
Veteran-Owned Pool Care You Can
Count On
hero.subheadline: For over 14 years, East Valley families have trusted our veteran-owned team to keep their pools crystal clear. We handle the maintenance and repairs so you can skip the hassle and just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> a Team You Can Trust
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency repairs, our veteran-led crew handles every aspect of pool care so you can enjoy a worry-free backyard all year long.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and precise chemical balancing every week. Your pool stays swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, motors, and vacuums — all makes and models. Fast diagnosis and reliable fixes, most completed same-visit.

cards.title: Green Pool Cleanup
cards.description: Neglected pool turned swamp-green? We'll muck it out and restore crystal-clear water in 48-72 hours. Emergency response available.

cards.title: Pool Plumbing Repair
cards.description: Blocked pipes, leaky drains, cracked plumbing lines — we find it and fix it. Full leak detection and repair service included.

cards.title: Acid Wash & Chlorine Rinse
cards.description: Remove stubborn stains, algae buildup, and mineral deposits from pool surfaces. We restore your pool to like-new condition.

cards.title: Salt System & DE Filter Service
cards.description: Expert cleaning, servicing, and replacement of salt cells and DE filter grids to keep your filtration running at peak efficiency.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we'll come out for a no-obligation inspection. You'll get an honest quote within 24 hours — no pressure, no contracts.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our licensed, insured technicians arrive on schedule and handle cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, and repairs — so you never have to think about it.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool Year-Round
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready every day. And if something isn't right, we come back and fix it at no extra charge.

about.label: Why East Valley Pool Owners Trust Us
about.headline: Veteran-Owned, Community-Driven Pool Care Since 2011
about.description: Founded by U.S. Army veteran Kevin Swafford, Malibu Pool Service has spent 14 years earning the trust of families across Apache Junction, Mesa, Gilbert, and the East Valley. We're not a franchise — we're your neighbors. Every technician is fully licensed and insured, and we proudly offer discounts to military members, police officers, and firefighters.

features.title: Licensed & Fully Insured
features.description: Licensed by the Arizona Registrar of Contractors with full liability coverage. Your property is always protected.

features.title: Military & First Responder Discounts
features.description: We honor those who serve. Active military, veterans, police officers, and firefighters receive special pricing on all services.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a service visit? We'll come back and make it right at no charge. That's our promise to every customer.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Get a plan that fits your pool and budget. No contracts, no hidden fees — just honest service from a veteran-owned team.

guarantee.headline: Our "Perfect Pool" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back and redo it — completely free. We've built our reputation on doing the job right, and we stand behind every visit. Your pool should make you smile, and we won't stop until it does.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response. Just call us at 602-748-0544 and we'll work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Do you offer military or first responder discounts?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. As a veteran-owned business, we proudly offer discounts to active military, veterans, police officers, and firefighters. Just let us know when you request your quote.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire East Valley including Apache Junction, Mesa, Gilbert, Chandler, Tempe, Ahwatukee, San Tan Valley, Queen Creek, and surrounding areas.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Nope! Most clients give us gate access and we take care of everything while you're away. You'll know exactly what was done after each visit.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Malibu Pool Service is fully licensed by the Arizona Registrar of Contractors and carries full liability insurance. We also hold an A+ rating with the BBB.

testimonials.name: Jules C.
testimonials.text: Malibu Pool has always been able to diagnose any problem quickly. They are reliable and knowledgeable when it comes to maintaining our older pool and spa heater.

testimonials.name: Eric M.
testimonials.text: Kevin at Malibu has been fantastic to work with! He provided great advice for overall maintenance and always goes above and beyond to make sure everything is running smoothly.

testimonials.name: Alfred H.
testimonials.text: Kevin came out a day earlier than scheduled and fixed our pump in no time. Excellent service and very professional. Highly recommend Malibu Pool Service!

Ready for a Pool That
Stays Crystal Clear?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation quote from a veteran-owned team that's served the East Valley for over 14 years. No contracts, no pressure — just honest pool care.
benefits: Free pool inspection with every quote
